scripts.format: vp fmt package.json README.md AGENTS.md vite.config.ts wxt.config.ts "entrypoints/**/*.{ts,tsx}" "lib/**/*.ts" "scripts/**/*.js" "tests/**/*.ts"
scripts.format:check: vp fmt --check package.json README.md AGENTS.md vite.config.ts wxt.config.ts "entrypoints/**/*.{ts,tsx}" "lib/**/*.ts" "scripts/**/*.js" "tests/**/*.ts"
scripts.lint: vp lint --type-aware --type-check --react-plugin --vitest-plugin entrypoints lib scripts tests vite.config.ts wxt.config.ts
scripts.check: vp check && vp run lint:gha && vp test && vp run build
